hero.subtitle: Experience beauty treatments inspired by the Mediterranean, combining natural ingredients and ancient techniques.

about.title: The art of Mediterranean care
about.description: Mediterranean Spa blends the finest traditions of Mediterranean beauty care with modern technology. Each treatment is crafted with precious ingredients from olive, lavender, and deep-sea minerals, delivering a holistic relaxation experience for body and soul.

items.title: Hot stone massage
items.desc: Therapeutic massage with heated basalt stones for deep muscle relaxation and improved circulation.

items.title: Olive facial mask
items.desc: Premium facial care with pure Greek olive extract for deep hydration and anti-aging.

items.title: Sea salt bath
items.desc: Immerse yourself in Mediterranean sea minerals to cleanse and rejuvenate your skin.

items.title: Lavender therapy
items.desc: Aromatherapy with Provençal lavender essential oils to reduce stress and improve natural sleep.

items.name: Thanh Thao
items.comment: Beautiful space that truly captures the Mediterranean feel. Very relaxing and professional.

items.name: Quoc Hung
items.comment: The Santorini package is the best spa experience I've ever had in Vietnam.

items.name: Mai Linh
items.comment: My skin improved noticeably after the olive treatment. Will recommend to friends.

contact.title: Experience it today
contact.subtitle: Let us bring you an authentic Mediterranean relaxation journey, right here in Saigon.
